world.title: DRC Ebola outbreak: hundreds of suspected cases, no vaccine
world.description: A fast-spreading Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) has health workers rushing to stop transmission while the roll out of any potential vaccine is months away, the UN World Health Organization (WHO) said on Tuesday.
